name: Meersburger Kirschen-Dessert (Cherry Desert Meeresburg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese to room temperature.
2. Grind almonds in a blender until ground; use if ground almonds are not available.
3. Wash and drain cherries. Remove stones and reserve 8 whole cherries for garnish.
4. Place cherries in a bowl; add kirsch.
5. In a small pan, boil 3 tbsp sugar with water for one minute to make a thin sugar syrup.
6. Add the sugar syrup to the cherries; stir to blend.
7. Cover and let soak for 20 minutes.
8. Cut ladyfingers in half, divide into four portions, and place in individual glass dishes.
9. Arrange cherries on top of the ladyfingers.
10. Thoroughly blend cream cheese with 6 tbsp sugar, vanilla extract, and ground almonds.
11. Whip the heavy cream and carefully fold it into the cream-cheese mixture.
12. Spoon over the cherries.
13. Garnish with chopped pistachio nuts and whole cherries.
